name: Verify Accounts List Load
expected: Accounts page loads and displays user's accounts
steps: Assert checking and savings accounts are listed

name: Verify Account Details Display
expected: Account details like name, type, and masked account number are visible

name: Verify Overdraft Banner
expected: Accounts with negative balance show an overdraft banner or indicator
steps: Assert overdraft warning indicator is present on the checking account

name: Verify Frozen Account Alert
expected: Frozen accounts display a prominent disabled banner

name: Verify Copy Account Number
expected: Clicking copy icon copies the account number to clipboard
steps: Click the copy icon next to an account number
Assert clipboard contains the account number

name: Verify Add Account Functionality
expected: User can add a new savings account
steps: Assert new account appears in the list
